title: centaurea axillaris var. occitanica
intro: Centaurea axillaris var. occitanica, also known as the Occitan knapweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Centaurea axillaris var. occitanica include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and relieve respiratory problems. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
